back_translation: Simon Peter, a slave and apostle of Jesus Christ, to those who have received a faith as precious as ours, by the righteousness of our God and Savior, who is Jesus Christ
May grace and peace be multiplied to you, by the true knowledge of God and of Jesus our Lord
The divine power of God of Him has given everything to us that is necessary for life and devotion-toward-God, through the true knowledge of Him who has called us by His own glory and goodness

Through these things, He has given us promises that are precious and most magnificent, so that through these promises you may participate in the divine nature, by escaping from the corruption in the world that arises from evil desire
For this very reason, you all strive with full effort to add virtue to your faith, and to add knowledge to virtue
And to add self-control to knowledge, and to add perseverance to self-control, and to add devotion-toward-God to perseverance
And to add brotherly-love to devotion-toward-God, and to add love to brotherly-love
Because if these things exist in you and grow abundantly, these things will make you not lacking-in-fruit and not without-fruit in the true knowledge concerning our Lord Jesus Christ
But whoever does not have these things, that one is blind and nearsighted, having forgotten that he has received cleansing from his past sins
Therefore, brothers, all-the-more strive to make secure your calling and election. For if you practice these things, you will never stumble
For thus you will receive the welcome abundantly into the eternal kingdom of our Lord Jesus Christ and Savior
Therefore I will determinedly remind you always concerning these things, even though you know them and are firmly-established in the truth that you have at this time
And I consider it appropriate, as long as I am still in the tent of this body, to wake you up by reminding-the-memory
Because I know that the laying-down of the tent of my body is approaching, as our Lord Jesus Christ has revealed to me
And I will strive to ensure that you can recall these things at every moment after I have departed

For when we proclaimed to you the matter of the power and the coming of our Lord Jesus Christ, we were not following cleverly-fabricated tales, but we became eyewitnesses with our own eyes of His greatness
For He received honor and glory from God the Father, when there came a voice like-this to Him from the great-and-magnificent Glory: ‘This is My beloved Son, in whom I am pleased’
And we ourselves heard this voice from heaven, when we were with Him on the holy mountain

And we have the word of the prophets that has been confirmed more-than-before, in which you do well to pay attention, like a lamp shining in a very-dark place, until the day dawns and the morning star rises in your hearts
Above all, you must understand that all the prophecies in the Scripture do not arise from the prophet's own interpretation
For the prophecy never occurred by the will of man, but men spoke words that came from God, by the leading of the Holy Spirit
